variants: Arjun Devarajan is an employee at Blizzard Forge Outfitting and a graduate of Fireglass College. Originally from Brookhollow Marsh, he has a unique perspective shaped by his understanding of Yoruba proverbs, which inform his work. Outside of his professional life, Arjun is actively involved with Refuge Support at Tinselbay, dedicating his time to volunteer efforts that help those in need.
